# Copilot Documentation Index — forklift-safety-system

> **Start here:** Read [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) in the repository root for the canonical onboarding guide.
> **Workflow:** [`openspec/AUTHORING.md`](../../openspec/AUTHORING.md) — full end-to-end spec-driven workflow.

## Slash Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/opsx-new` | Start a new change (lite or full schema) |
| `/opsx-continue` | Create the next artifact in the current change |
| `/opsx-ff` | Fast-forward — generate all planning artifacts at once |
| `/opsx-apply` | Implement tasks against the spec |
| `/opsx-review` | Review implementation vs. spec + conventions |
| `/opsx-verify` | Verify completeness and update status |
| `/opsx-archive` | Archive a completed change |
| `/opsx-explore` | Investigate the codebase before specifying |
| `/opsx-adr` | Create an Architecture Decision Record |
| `/opsx-learnings` | Append discoveries to `AGENTS.md` |
| `/opsx-pr` | Generate / update the PR description |

| Full — Spec | [`../../openspec/templates/full/spec.md`](../../openspec/templates/full/spec.md) |
| Full — Design | [`../../openspec/templates/full/design.md`](../../openspec/templates/full/design.md) |
| Full — Tasks | [`../../openspec/templates/full/tasks.md`](../../openspec/templates/full/tasks.md) |
